vocabulary.word: pitch / track / court / course / ring / rink

phrasal_verbs.meaning: change the date/time of an event so it happens earlier
defeat and remove from a competition; make unconscious
start (after planning to do sth for a long time)
stop being involved in an activity
do; do sth you should not do
start (a hobby, sport, etc); fill an amount of space/time

C.title: Original key word transformation practice
C.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

questions.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **PUT**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **ROUND**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **GET**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **GONE**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **ON**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games. **PUT**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Hobbies, sport and games.

F.title: Original matching practice
F.instructions: Match each original prompt with the correct ending.

questions.sentence: During the class project on Hobbies, sport and games, Mia wrote ...... to complete the model sentence.
In an original matching item about Hobbies, sport and games, the best completion is ...... .
questions.answer: A – in playing for the school team.

questions.sentence: Sara checked the matching practice notes and added ...... to the example.

questions.answer: B – to find enough time to have any hobbies.

questions.answer: F – to what the coach thinks first.

questions.sentence: In an original matching item about Hobbies, sport and games, the best completion is ...... .
questions.answer: C – to try to find the golf balls we'd lost.
